Jet2holidays £120 off holidays terms and conditions - (ref: 1357)

  • The promotion code SAVEONSUMMER must be added at the time of booking.
  • Offer only valid on new holidays booked between 00:01: 29 April 2026 to 23:59: 13 May 2026.
  • The discount is valid on all holiday departures from 29 April 2026 to 31 October 2027.
